infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Aye Auto Driver needs your location to show your position and accept ride requests.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Aye Auto Driver tracks your location while you are online to match you with nearby riders.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Aye Auto Driver needs camera access to upload your documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Aye Auto Driver needs photo library access to upload your documents.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Aye Auto Driver needs your location to accept ride requests.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Aye Auto Driver tracks your location while you are online.

plugins.photosPermission: Aye Auto Driver needs access to your photos to upload documents.
plugins.cameraPermission: Aye Auto Driver needs camera access to take document photos.
